name: Google DESIGN.md
risk_notes: Specification source, not a visual style source; use for structure and validation rather than page aesthetics.

name: VoltAgent awesome-design-md
risk_notes: High brand-copy temptation; extract abstract homepage structure and hierarchy only.

name: awesome-design-skills
risk_notes: Use for process and gates, not final visual style.

name: awesome-claude-design
risk_notes: Good for fast scaffolds; cross-check against stricter design systems before production.

name: design-md-for-ai
risk_notes: Secondary corpus; use to cross-check, not to anchor a single brand direction.

name: awesome-ios-design-md
risk_notes: Strong mobile guidance; avoid over-applying native patterns to desktop-heavy SaaS.

name: Material Design 3
risk_notes: Reliable system baseline; may feel generic without project-specific personality.

name: Shopify Polaris
risk_notes: Excellent for trust and forms; avoid making all marketing pages feel like admin UI.

name: IBM Carbon Design System
risk_notes: Strong for data/enterprise; can feel too heavy for lightweight consumer homepages.

name: Microsoft Fluent 2
risk_notes: Good enterprise familiarity; pair with stronger brand direction to avoid generic productivity UI.

name: Ant Design
risk_notes: Strong for admin/dashboard density; too heavy for simple landing pages.

name: shadcn/ui ecosystem
risk_notes: Implementation-friendly; avoid default-template sameness by adding project-specific hierarchy and brand tokens.

name: GitHub Primer
risk_notes: Use for developer/product clarity and component discipline; do not copy GitHub brand, Octicons identity, or exact repository UI composition.

name: Radix UI Primitives
risk_notes: Excellent behavior source, weak visual direction source; pair with visual/token references for final DESIGN.md aesthetics.

name: GOV.UK Design System
risk_notes: Use for accessibility and service clarity; do not copy GOV.UK identity, crown/government cues, or exact public-service styling.

name: U.S. Web Design System
risk_notes: Strong accessibility/service source; can make private SaaS feel too institutional unless softened with brand-specific tokens.

name: Adobe Spectrum / React Spectrum
risk_notes: Use for accessible complex app behavior; avoid copying Adobe product identity, iconography, or creative-suite visual language.

name: Chakra UI
risk_notes: Good pragmatic UI source; avoid generic component-library sameness by adding project-specific hierarchy and brand tokens.

name: Mantine
risk_notes: Strong implementation reference for product UI; use separate brand/landing references for distinct homepage personality.

name: Open Props
strengths: broad CSS custom property token set
risk_notes: Token source, not a complete product design system; combine with component/accessibility references.

name: Headless UI
risk_notes: Behavior/reference source only; pair with visual systems so generated docs do not become implementation-only.

name: Elastic UI Framework
risk_notes: Not permissive OSS; use as high-level data UX reference only after license caution, and do not copy Elastic branding or component code.

name: WAI-ARIA Authoring Practices Guide
license: W3C Document License / W3C Software License
risk_notes: Authoritative behavior source, not a visual style source; use to validate interaction semantics rather than page aesthetics.

name: WCAG Quick Reference
risk_notes: Use as a standard and QA source; translate criteria into product-specific rules instead of dumping compliance prose into DESIGN.md.

name: Inclusive Components
risk_notes: Use for principles and pitfalls only; do not copy article text or examples verbatim.

name: The A11Y Project
license: open-source project / site content terms vary

live_sources.license: open-source project / site content terms vary

risk_notes: Community reference; cross-check strict requirements against WCAG/WAI-ARIA before treating as normative.

name: Design Tokens Community Group Specification
risk_notes: Standard source, not a style source; use for token architecture and validation language.

name: Style Dictionary
risk_notes: Implementation pipeline reference; pair with visual and accessibility sources for user-facing design direction.

name: Tailwind CSS
risk_notes: Use for implementation and token mapping, not as a visual identity; avoid generic Tailwind template sameness.

name: Panda CSS
risk_notes: Implementation architecture reference; combine with visual references so Artic outputs design intent, not only code structure.

name: Park UI
risk_notes: Use as a component pattern source; avoid copying exact demo compositions or default visual treatment without project-specific tokens.

name: Salesforce Lightning Design System
risk_notes: Source and assets have mixed licenses; extract abstract enterprise UX patterns only, not Salesforce branding, icons, illustrations, or exact component styling.

name: Atlassian Design System
risk_notes: License is limited; use as high-level pattern/reference guidance only and do not copy Atlassian branding, exact component styling, token names wholesale, or illustrations.

name: Apple Human Interface Guidelines
risk_notes: Apple documentation is not OSS; use only high-level platform principles and avoid copying Apple visual identity, layouts, icons, or marketing style.

name: Motion for JavaScript / React
risk_notes: Use to define purposeful, accessible motion; always include reduced-motion and performance constraints.
